# Rahul Rangarao

> Systems builder. OSS: durable agent memory, provenance-safe compression, agent protocols.
> Mission: attribution survives compression and reuse · plagiarism becomes structurally hard.

## Projects
- knowledge-worker (PyPI): local-first knowledge graph for durable AI-assistant memory · https://github.com/rahulmranga/knowledge-worker
- AG-UI protocol: open protocol for agent-UI interop · https://protocol.vaked.dev
- kompress (paper + notebook): provenance-preserving compression research · https://kompress.vaked.dev
- longrun-eval-kompress: eval harness, with Peter Lodri · https://github.com/peterlodri-sec/longrun-eval-kompress

## Writing
- Quantum Theory Decoded: cross-entropy-of-future note on uncertainty, entropy, and decision-making · https://rahulrangarao.dev/blog/quantum-theory-decoded/
- Medium: https://medium.com/@rahulmohanrangarao
- Dev.to: https://dev.to/rahulmranga

## Demos
- cosmic maze (RALPH × LODRI), ohm, geo-maze, brain-graph · https://rahulmranga.github.io/kompress-ultra/
